decision.rationale: Adult canonical cue path and Teen signal path do not emit equivalent normalized canonical evidence prior to policy.

outcomes.shared_semantic_transform_with_age_speci: Extract shared detection+normalization primitive only; keep Adult/Teen policy wrappers separate.
outcomes.policy_contaminated_transform_split: Reclassify as semantic split; do not force consolidation.
outcomes.parity_candidate: Freeze parity baseline and proceed with narrow consolidation.
outcomes.adult_only_canonicalization_capability: Keep age-specific and remove from active consolidation.
